name: Drift Mote Swarm
description: A cloud of crystalline motes born where drift events fray reality. Individually harmless; en masse they shear at anything coherent, phasing in and out of the lattice.
starting_behavior: Drifts toward drift-alerts, disperses and reforms when struck

name: Crucible Warden
description: A drift-warped quadruped of fused stone and light, patrolling the breach lines the Witnesses document. Its hide hardens as the drift intensifies around it.
starting_behavior: Territorial sentinel of drift sites, grows tougher near active drift

name: Echo Serpent
description: A ribbon of half-real matter that mirrors the movements of whatever it stalks, a fraction of a second behind, until it lunges from the lag.
starting_behavior: Mimics a target's path, strikes from the delay
